name: let_your_hair_down
description: Let Your Hair Down, short song (86 words)

segments.text: Let your hair down, baby
Let's have a natural ball
'Cause when you ain't happy, ain't no fun at all
You can't take it with you, that's one thing for sure
No, you can't take it with you, that's one thing for sure
Ain't nothin' wrong with you, girl
But T-bone shuffle can't do it
Have fun while you can, faith's an awful thing
Have fun while you can, faith's an awful thing
You can't tell what might happen, that's why I love to sing
